abilities.name: 틀깨기
abilities.description: 특성에 관계없이 상대에게 기술을 쓸 수 있다.

flavorTexts.text: This Pokémon will attack groups of Pawniard and Bisharp, gathering metal from them in order to create a large and sturdy hammer.
These Pokémon make their homes in piles of scrap metal. They test the strength of each other’s hammers by smashing them together.
